<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Config; use Spatie\Backup\Support\Data; use Spatie\Backup\Tasks\Monitor\HealthCheck; class MonitoredBackupConfig extends Data { /** * @param array<string> $disks * @param array<class-string<HealthCheck>, int> $healthChecks */ protected function __construct( public string $name, public array $disks, public array $healthChecks, ) {} /** @param array<mixed> $data */ public static function fromArray(array $data): self { return new self( name: $data['name'], disks: $data['disks'], healthChecks: $data['health_checks'], ); } }
